summary: Full e2e testing of Astra AI app - all backend APIs and frontend pages tested successfully. 27/27 backend tests pass. All 7 pages load and function correctly.

issues: Status labels show 'ACTIVE/PAUSED/DRAFT' in English instead of Portuguese (inconsistent with rest of UI)

action_items: Minor: Workflows status counters show English labels (ACTIVE/PAUSED/DRAFT) instead of Portuguese like other pages
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 502 lines - approaching size limit, acceptable for now
Chat 503 error is correctly displayed in the UI with helpful message about configuring OpenClaw URL
Dashboard metric card shows 'Base de Conhecimento' with '0 workflows' subtitle which seems incorrect - should show knowledge item count context

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all pages load and integrate correctly

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and deleted test data (TEST_ prefixed). Some log entries remain from test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows working. Dashboard, Chat (503 error correctly shown), Agents CRUD, Logs with filters, Knowledge Base CRUD, Workflows CRUD with run, Settings load/save all working. Backend 27/27 tests pass. Only minor issue: Workflows status labels in English.
